base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of nes_menu_password_entered — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 metroid. Filled-password display — showing code after entry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Filled-password display — showing code after entry
